channel.title: Almost Headless Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Almost Headless Blog

item.title: About
item.description: Student at Supaero, Toulouse. Interested in AI, maths and brazilian jiu-jitsu. LinkedIn : https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicolas-pellerin-64b8b921b/ Trying a photo #Test #

item.title: Mechanics of a juji-gatame
item.description: We will use simple physics to gain insight into what it takes to complete an armbar : levers, fulcrums, angles, … Multiple positions How levers work The need of a fulcrum Lever arm Coupled forces
